decisions.rationale: Valid functional gap: useCoachingModeUpdate.ts updates local React state for bTIRi badge text only and does not persist coaching mode to chatconversation context. CHAT-03 decompose scope wires composer send to the CHAT-05 API layer and explicitly does not re-implement DS-06 coaching-mode UI; CHAT-05 layout_notes assign mode-change events to chatconversation context field updates and list useCoachingModeUpdate.ts in target_files. criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3 pass, functional_audit FV-1..FV-4 pass, and CHAT-05 depends_on gate needs bTIUt mount + ?conversation= routing + message list — all satisfied. Defer full mode persistence wiring to CHAT-05-chat-messaging-and-create-flow.

During loading, ChatPanelMount keeps the bTIUt root wrapper (data-bubble-id on outer div) but swaps ChatReusable (bTIRW) for generic "Loading conversation…" text. criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3 pass and ui_evidence for bTIUt/bTIRW both pass on the loaded path; no AC requires skeleton markers or bTIRW subtree during fetch. Loading-state presentation is optional visual polish, not a named ui_ref contract failure. CHAT-03 downstream consumers (CHAT-05) need mounted composable and message binding, not loading skeleton fidelity. Defer skeleton/loading-prop pattern to DS-06 shell polish or CHAT-05 end-to-end QA.

Valid grounding edge case: conversation title/mode metadata comes from fetchConversations sidebar list (conversations.find) rather than a direct chatconversation row read, so deep-linked ?conversation= ids absent from the list show CHAT_CONVERSATION_DEFAULTS title until sidebar reload. criteria_audit AC-1 passes (URL param resolves mount; prop binding satisfied on happy path) and functional_audit FV-1..FV-3 pass. CHAT-03 scope binds chatconversation from URL param via chatRouteStore — not obligated to implement single-row fetch. Does not block CHAT-05 depends_on (mount, send API, routing). Defer direct chatconversation-by-id fetch in ChatPanelMount.reload() to CHAT-05 API-layer resilience alongside C-1 mode persistence.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 coaching mode context-field persistence to CHAT-05; C-2 loading skeleton / bTIRW markers during fetch to DS-06 shell polish; C-3 direct chatconversation row fetch for deep-linked headers to CHAT-05 API resilience.
